name: Newcrest Mining Limited
description: Newcrest Mining Limited was an Australian-based corporation that engaged in the exploration, development, mining, and sale of gold and gold-copper concentrate. Headquartered in Melbourne, it was recognized as Australia's largest gold producer before being acquired by Newmont Corporation in 2023. The company operated a portfolio of low-cost, long-life mining assets across several countries, including Australia, Canada, and Papua New Guinea, focusing on sustainable mining practices and the extraction of precious metals to serve global markets.
